form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last campaign fourth of 8 at Dundalk All Weather January 28 over 2112m, 3 len behind Nowshesdancing with 61kg at $17. On debut seventh of 9 at Dundalk All Weather January 13 over 2414m, 14 len behind Soaring Sun carrying 58kg at $21. Will benefit greatly from this hitout.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of two-and-a-half years. Finished off last campaign third in a small field at Punchestown December 12 2023 over 3218m, on rain affected going; 9 len behind Spillane's Tower with 74kg at $7. When resuming last campaign seventh of 14 at Roscommon July 4 2023 over 2313m, 5 len behind Glan with 61kg at $23. Tempted to give him this.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation when last of 14 at Dundalk All Weather November 26 over 2414m, 22 len behind Cinammon Coco carrying 63kg at $101. First up last campaign fifth of 11 at Wexford March 17 2025 over 3218m, 27 len behind Theflyingking carrying 74kg at $7.50. Will need this run.

form.formComment: Last start 4th of 10 at Wexford on March 17 over 3218m, slow going 11 len behind Westoftignes carrying 75.5kg at $7.50. The run before that 3rd of 11 at Navan on February 8 over 3218m, on rain affected going; 25 len behind Coyote Spirit carrying 75.5kg at $6.50. Has ability but must improve sharply.

form.formComment: Returns from a 57-day let-up. At the latest run 6th of 10 at Dundalk All Weather on February 13 over 2414m, 7 len behind Palmezzano carrying 62kg at $7.50. The run before that came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 9 at Dundalk All Weather on January 13 over 2414m, 7 len behind Soaring Sun carrying 61kg at $34. Prefer to see him back in form.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Returns from a 57-day let-up. form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after 11 months 2nd of 23 at Curragh on March 15 over 1609m, on rain affected going; 1.3 len behind Victory Tip with 66.5kg at $67. Previously second-up 14th of 20 at Navan 3yo Mdn Sw on April 26 over 2011m, slow going 25 len behind Reyenzi with 61kg at $51. Fitter for that run and will be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second of 13 at Thurles December 20 over 3218m, 16 len behind Zeus Power carrying 75.5kg at $6. First up last campaign second of 14 at Punchestown June 8 over 3319m, 2.25 len behind Mick Collins with 73kg at $1.80. Strong top three prospect.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation sixth of 9 at Dundalk All Weather January 13 over 2414m, 13 len behind Soaring Sun carrying 60.5kg at $34. form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding (Vadamos - Tommy Hilfilly) at the races for the first time. Prefer to let go without a strong market move.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign fifth of 21 at Leopardstown December 26 over 3218m, 13 len behind Ballyfad with 73kg at $6.50. First up last campaign second of 16 at Gowran Park November 8 over 3218m, on heavy track; 2.5 len behind Chase The Moon carrying 73kg at $1.30. This is an ideal race to kick off. Expected to make a bright return.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when didn't finish the race at Fairyhouse December 13 over 3218m. Resumes today and would rather see how she's come back before considering.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 12 at Dundalk All Weather on March 27 over 1609m, 20 len behind Gaiety Girl with 56kg at $301. Can't see her breaking through for the maiden win this time.
